title: procheirizomai #4400
definition:
1) to put into the hand, to deliver into the hands
 2) to take into one's hands
 3) to set before one's self, to prostrate, to determine
 4) to choose, to appoint
    4a) for one's use
    4b) for one's salvation
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) to put into the hand, to deliver into the hands
 2) to take into one's hands
 3) to set before one's self, to prostrate, to determine
 4) to choose, to appoint
    4a) for one's use
    4b) for one's salvation

    NASB:  to put into the hand, to take into ones hand, hence to determine:
